channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: China Denies Government Involvement in Viral Video, Reiterates Rejection of South China Sea Ruling
item.description: China's foreign ministry has clarified that a viral video circulating online is not an official government act, while reaffirming its longstanding rejection of the 2016 South China Sea arbitral ruling...

item.title: Tanzania News Roundup: Key Developments and Updates
item.description: The article from July 17, 2026, presents a compilation of news highlights covering various sectors. Key topics include praise for OSHA's development contributions, diplomatic statements by Ambassador ...

item.title: Cancer Society Commends Class-Action Certification Against JUUL E-Cigarette Maker
item.description: The Canadian Cancer Society has publicly endorsed the certification of a class-action lawsuit against Juul, an American e-cigarette company. This legal action alleges that Juul's marketing practices c...

item.title: NUPRC Urges PPL Holders to Boost Investment as Nigeria Aims for 2M Bpd by 2027
item.description: The Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission (NUPRC) has directed newly licensed Petroleum Prospecting License (PPL) holders to accelerate asset development and meet financial obligations und...

item.title: Financial pressures drive South African food choices despite health awareness
item.description: A study by the University of the Western Cape highlights how financial constraints and household dynamics heavily influence food decisions in South Africa. Despite awareness of healthy eating, partici...

item.title: Israeli military actions in Gaza raise concerns over civilian casualties and international law violations
item.description: A recent article from July 17, 2026, discusses escalating tensions between Israel and Hamas in the Gaza Strip, with allegations of widespread civilian casualties and potential war crimes. The piece hi...

item.title: Supreme Court confirms forfeiture of Emefiele's assets to Federal Government
item.description: The Supreme Court has confirmed the final forfeiture of seven landed properties, $2.045 million, and share certificates linked to former CBN Governor Godwin Emefiele to the Federal Government. This de...

item.title: TakealotMORE membership unlocks exclusive discounts and convenience for South Africans
item.description: TakealotMORE, a membership program by Takealot and Mr D, offers South Africans exclusive benefits including free nationwide delivery, up to 50% discounts on Takealot, and special offers across restaur...

item.title: Laos Distillery Owner Charged Over Methanol Poisonings That Killed Australian Teens
item.description: A distillery owner in Laos has been charged over the 2024 methanol poisoning incident that killed six foreign nationals, including two Australian teenagers, Holly Morton-Bowles and Bianca Jones. Danis...

item.title: Municipal Councilor Killed in Ambush During BARMM Election Gun Ban
item.description: A municipal councilor in Cotabato was killed in an ambush in Midsayap town on the first day of the implementation of a gun ban imposed by the Commission on Elections for the upcoming Bangsamoro electo...

item.title: Kpop Demon Hunters remains a top Netflix film with over 130 million views in seven months
item.description: The animated K-pop film 'Kpop Demon Hunters' continues to dominate Netflix's streaming charts, securing a position in the Top Five most-watched films of 2026. Released last year, the movie has surpass...

item.title: Quebec Advances Olympic Stadium Renovations for Modernization and Year-Round Use
item.description: The Quebec government has approved plans to renovate the interior of Montreal’s Olympic Stadium, Tourism Minister Amélie Dionne announced. This comes as construction on the $870-million roof replaceme...

item.title: Government, partners collaborate to strengthen Nigeria's pharmaceutical manufacturing
item.description: The Federal Government, in collaboration with development partners and industry players, is advancing plans to boost local pharmaceutical manufacturing through the IMPACT Project. This initiative, lau...

item.title: CRISIL Upgrades Vedanta Group Companies, Reflecting Stronger Financial Position
item.description: CRISIL Ratings has upgraded the credit ratings of key Vedanta Group entities, including Vedanta Limited, Vedanta Aluminium, and Vedanta Oil & Gas, marking a significant improvement in their financial ...

item.title: Tanzania to Develop Sh6.31 Trillion SGR Linking Tabora and Kigoma
item.description: Tanzania is set to commence construction of the Sh6.31 trillion Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) Lot 6 connecting Tabora and Kigoma, with President Samia Suluhu Hassan expected to officiate the groundbrea...

item.title: Tanzania's Rural Water Access Reaches 85% Coverage
item.description: Tanzania has made significant progress in improving access to clean water in rural areas, with coverage now reaching 85% according to recent reports. This development marks a crucial step toward addre...

item.title: Andy Burnham outlines vision for Labour government and social care reforms ahead of PM role
item.description: Andy Burnham, the newly elected Labour leader, has confirmed he is finalising his cabinet appointments ahead of assuming the role of Prime Minister on Monday. In his first speech as Labour leader, Bur...

item.title: Trump Reacts to Wildfire Smoke Impacting U.S. Air Quality
item.description: President Donald Trump escalated tensions with Canada on July 17, 2026, after wildfires and smoke from the northern neighbor caused significant air quality issues in the U.S. Midwest and Northeast. In...

item.title: Technical Insights from Rebuilding a macOS Gaming Diagnostics App in Swift
item.description: The article details the author's experience in improving a macOS gaming diagnostics tool called CloudBoost. Initially, the app struggled to provide actionable insights into cloud gaming instability is...

item.title: Trump's repeated election fraud allegations threaten democratic integrity ahead of midterms
item.description: US President Donald Trump has used a nationwide address to revive claims the 2020 election was stolen, despite declassified documents refuting these assertions. Critics argue his focus is not on provi...
